INFO 32533 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists about_app cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists apps_name cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists daily_task cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists daily_task_co_operator cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists place_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists preventive_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists preventive_maintenance cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists task_users cascade Hibernate: create table about_app ( id bigint generated by default as identity, app_name varchar(255) not null, recommended varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table apps_name ( id bigint generated by default as identity, app_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table daily_task ( is_remote boolean not null, task_status boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, expected_completion_date timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), app_name varchar(255) not null, assigned_by varchar(255) not null, assigned_to varchar(255) not null, sub_place varchar(255), task_note varchar(255), task_priority varchar(255) not null, task_title varchar(255) not null, visit_place varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table daily_task_co_operator ( daily_task_id bigint not null, co_operator varchar(255) ) Hibernate: create table place_item ( id bigint generated by default as identity, place_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table preventive_item ( id bigint generated by default as identity, action varchar(255) not null, app_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table preventive_maintenance ( is_remote boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, action varchar(255) not null, app_name varchar(255) not null, place_name varchar(255) not null, sub_place varchar(255), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table task_users ( is_enable boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, department varchar(255) not null, display_name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','USER','MANAGER','GENERAL_MANAGER','SECTOR_MANAGER')), username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists daily_task_co_operator add constraint FKbs48q5qg05n3hr1ec1ryegm0s foreign key (daily_task_id) references daily_task 2026-04-20T10:13:26.040+02:00 INFO 32533 --- [ testcase.name: test02_signup_duplicate_username
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T10:13:29.144+02:00 INFO 32533 --- [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.a.t.controller.auth.AuthController : Signup request received for username: newuser 2026-04-20T10:13:29.144+02:00 DEBUG 32533 --- [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.a.tasks_api.service.UserServiceImpl : Registering new user with username: newuser Hibernate: select u1_0.id from task_users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only 2026-04-20T10:13:29.148+02:00 ERROR 32533 --- [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.a.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Runtime error: Error: Username is already taken! Response status: 400 BAD_REQUEST Response body: {error=Error: Username is already taken!}

testcase.name: test03_signin_admin
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T10:13:29.173+02:00 INFO 32533 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] c.a.t.controller.auth.AuthController : Signin request received for username: admin Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.department, u1_0.display_name, u1_0.is_enable, u1_0.password, u1_0.role, u1_0.username from task_users u1_0 where u1_0.username=?
